message.content:
@startuml
title Secure Map Reduce 2 – Shuffle Service Token Flow

participant "Client (c)" as c
participant "Resource Manager (rm)" as rm
participant "Node Manager (nm)" as nm
participant "Shuffle Handler (ss)" as ss
participant "File System (fs)" as fs

autonumber

rectangle "Bootstrap" {
  c -> rm: createJob [...] ()
  rm -> c: : job-id
  rm -> c: createShuffleToken
  c -> rm: 2 ( shfl-tkn-mk )
  rm -> c: : shfl-tkn
  rm -> c: serializeTokens
  c -> rm: 3 ( shfl-tkn, ... )
  rm -> c: : c-tokens{shfl-tkn,...}
}

rectangle "Job Submission" {
  c -> rm: submitApplication
  c -> rm: 4 [...]
  c -> rm: ( job-id, c-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
  rm -> c: : app-rpt{clnt-tkn}
}

rectangle "Job Initiation" {
  rm -> nm: startContainer
  rm -> nm: 5 [...]
  rm -> nm: ( c-tokens{shfl-tkn},svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
  nm -> Application Master (am): initApp
  nm -> Application Master (am): 6 ( job-id, shfl-tkn )
  nm -> Application Master (am): exec
  nm -> Application Master (am): 7 exec
  Application Master (am) -> Application Container (ac): startContainer
  Application Master (am) -> Application Container (ac): 8 [...]
  Application Master (am) -> Application Container (ac): ( svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
  Application Master (am) -> Application Container (ac): exec
  Application Master (am) -> Application Container (ac): 9 exec
  Application Container (ac) -> Task (t): exec
  Application Container (ac) -> Task (t): 10 exec
}

rectangle "Map Task Execution" {
  Task (t) -> File System (fs): writeShuffleData[]()
  Task (t) -> File System (fs): 11 writeShuffleData[]()
}

rectangle "Reduce Task Execution" {
  Shuffle Handler (ss) -> File System (fs): readShuffleData [SDT:shfl-tkn] (...)
  Shuffle Handler (ss) -> File System (fs): 12 readShuffleData
  File System (fs) -> Shuffle Handler (ss): 13 readShuffleData
  File System (fs) -> Shuffle Handler (ss): 14 shfl-data
}

rectangle "Job Completion" {
}

note right of Application Master (am)
  Application Master (am)
end note

note right of Application Container (ac)
  Application Container (ac)
end note

note right of Task (t)
  Task (t)
end note

@enduml
